bottleneck_identified: The hero image uses next/image with 'fill' and 'priority' but lacks 'sizes'. Without 'sizes', Next.js defaults to generating srcsets assuming a 100vw image width, which may load a sub-optimally sized version initially.
fix_applied: Added 'sizes="100vw"' to the hero image in app/components/scrollytelling/Hero.tsx to ensure optimal responsive image generation.
expected_improvement: A better sized initial image might be selected, improving the time it takes to display the image fully, thereby marginally improving the LCP proxy.
how_to_verify: 1. Run `pnpm dev`. 2. Open `http://localhost:3000`. 3. Inspect the hero image element and verify it has `sizes="100vw"`. 4. Observe the Network tab to see if a more appropriately sized image is downloaded initially.
